_id.description: The unique identifier for the added document.

_index.description: The name of the index the document was added to.

_primary_term.description: The primary term assigned to the document for the indexing operation.

result.description: The result of the indexing operation: `created` or `updated`.

_seq_no.description:
The sequence number assigned to the document for the indexing operation.
Sequence numbers are used to ensure an older version of a document doesn't overwrite a newer version.

_shards.description: Information about the replication process of the operation.

_version.description: The document version, which is incremented each time the document is updated.

failure_store.description: The role of the failure store in this document response
